records.ety: [L. explorare to explore; ex out+plorare to cry out aloud,prob. orig., to cause to flow; perh. akin to E. flow: cf. F. explorer.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Explored(?); p. pr. & vb. n. Exploring.]

defs: To seek for or after; to strive to attain by search; to look wisely and carefully for.
quotes: Explores the lost, the wandering sheep directs.

defs: To search through or into; to penetrate or range over for discovery; to examine thoroughly; as, to explore new countries or seas; to explore the depths of science.
